---
title: "John Henry Parker"
---

## John Henry Parker

**Dates:** (1806-1884)

### Description

Tractarian publisher in Oxford

### Biography

He was keeper of the Ashmolean Museum and the publisher of CMY’s <i>Kenneth, or the Rearguard of the Grand Army</i>, but should not be confused with John William Parker, who published <i>The Heir of Redclyffe</i>. [DLB 106]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 1st [1900]
- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, March 1st 1899](../letters/3398_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)
- Letter from Decr 14th 1897
- Letter from Decr 9th 1882
- Letter from Decr 17th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Dec 1st [1854]
- Letter from Jany 21st [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
